Bash(pnpm view rolldown --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('Description:', d.get\('description'\)\); [print\(f'  {k}'\) for k in sorted\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)]" 2>&1)

Bash(pnpm view oxc-transform --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('Description:', d.get\('description'\)\); exp=d.get\('exports',{}\); print\('Exports:'\); [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in exp.items\(\)]" 2>&1)

Bash(pnpm view rolldown --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
exp = d.get\('exports', {}\)
print\('All exports:'\)
for k, v in sorted\(exp.items\(\)\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {json.dumps\(v, indent=4\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(pnpm view @oxc-node/core --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Just show the key exports
exp = d.get\('exports', {}\)
for k in ['.', './esm', './esm.mjs', './register', './register.mjs']:
    if k in exp:
        print\(f'{k}: {json.dumps\(exp[k]\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Main:', d.get\('main'\)\)
print\('Module:', d.get\('module'\)\)
print\('Types:', d.get\('types'\)\)
" 2>&1)
